subtitle: & Project Management
profil: Lead Developer and Project Manager with extensive expertise in JavaScript, C#, and object-oriented programming. I spearhead the development of robust, scalable solutions using Clean Architecture. Experienced in leading Agile teams, I specialise in translating complex technical requirements into functional, high-performance, and maintainable tools.

formation.diplome: HND Electrical Engineering and Industrial Computing (Year 2)

experience_professionnelle.description: Led the complete rewrite of Pharmacy Management Software (LGO) into a modern web application (PHP/Vue.js) following a migration from VB. Headed the team using Scrum and XP methodologies, including UML architecture modelling and development of critical C# (.NET) modules. Managed the full project lifecycle: technical specifications, testing, deployment, security, and evolutionary maintenance.

Dedicated period in the medico-social sector supporting individuals with severe disabilities. This role strengthened my emotional intelligence and leadership capabilities, allowing me to bridge the gap between technical rigour and active listening to meet user needs.

Established and managed a sole proprietorship specialising in digital solution development. Designed dynamic websites (PHP, Vanilla JS) and developed native Android mobile applications (Java). Managed end-to-end client relations, from technical requirements analysis to final delivery and deployment.

Installed and maintained telephony (PABX/IPBX) and IT solutions for SMEs, including system programming, user training, and remote support. Conducted testing and troubleshooting of electronic boards, as well as programming and debugging microcontrollers and logic circuits using C and Assembly.

centres_d_interets: Tech enthusiast focused on solving cybersecurity challenges on Root-Me, alongside interests in smart home design (home automation), gastronomy, and swimming.
